'''Pel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Vorzydiak]] and a member of the [[Freelies]].

==Biography==
She, like all Freelies, sabotaged the factories of [[Vorzyd IV]], to make the people realize that the job was not the main thing in a perfect society that the [[Vorzydiak]]s tried to built. She was a supporter of [[Grath (Vorzydiak)|Grath]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Threat Within]]'' {{1st}}
